## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated for all behaviour changes
- [ ] Fixtures added for new rules (positive **and** negative cases)
- [ ] All 27+ tests pass locally (`npm run test:verbose`)
- [ ] Rule IDs are stable and globally unique across all packs
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated with a user-facing entry
- [ ] Docs updated if any option, rule field, or scope was added/changed
- [ ] No `node_modules` or generated files committed
